creator: pokui@psg.com
text:
The problem is the go it is built against. Running /usr/local/bin/headscale --help gives:

```
panic: Something in this program imports go4.org/unsafe/assume-no-moving-gc to declare that it assumes a non-moving garbage collector, but your version of go4.org/unsafe/assume-no-moving-gc hasn't been updated to assert that it's safe against the go1.21 runtime. If you want to risk it, run with environment variable ASSUME_NO_MOVING_GC_UNSAFE_RISK_IT_WITH=go1.21 set. Notably, if go1.21 adds a moving garbage collector, this program is unsafe to use.

goroutine 1 [running]:
go4.org/unsafe/assume-no-moving-gc.init.0()
	go4.org/unsafe/assume-no-moving-gc@v0.0.0-20220617031537-928513b29760/untested.go:25 +0x1f2
```

Setting the variable on the command line or environment lets it run but it is not clear how to set this in the rc startup script. I am on 14.1-RELEASE-p3 

```
➜  ~ ASSUME_NO_MOVING_GC_UNSAFE_RISK_IT_WITH=go1.21 /usr/local/bin/headscale --help

headscale is an open source implementation of the Tailscale control server

https://github.com/juanfont/headscale

Usage:
  headscale [command]

Available Commands:
  apikeys     Handle the Api keys in Headscale
  completion  Generate the autocompletion script for the specified shell
  debug       debug and testing commands
  generate    Generate commands
  help        Help about any command
  namespaces  Manage the namespaces of Headscale
  nodes       Manage the nodes of Headscale
  preauthkeys Handle the preauthkeys in Headscale
  routes      Manage the routes of Headscale
  serve       Launches the headscale server
  version     Print the version.

Flags:
  -c, --config string   config file (default is /etc/headscale/config.yaml)
      --force           Disable prompts and forces the execution
  -h, --help            help for headscale
  -o, --output string   Output format. Empty for human-readable, 'json', 'json-line' or 'yaml'

Use "headscale [command] --help" for more information about a command.
➜  ~ 

```
